Description: "Replace headline query building logic in App.tsx queue render block to join 3 lines with newlines in triple mode."
Instruction: "Replace queue headline parameter binding logic to support 3-line headlines."
TargetContent: "    // Use manually typed headline if it is the currently selected active item, otherwise use item headline/title\n    const activeHeadline = (canvasSelectedItem?.id === item.id) ? canvasHeadline : (item.selected_headline || item.title);\n    q.append('headline', activeHeadline);"
